title: 30-Year Janitorial Company | 90%+ Recurring Revenue | Absentee-Ready
reasonForSelling: My family is moving out of state.
supportTraining: The seller is committed to a seamless transition. A comprehensive training period will be provided covering all aspects of operations: client communication protocols, scheduling and route management, subcontractor relationships and management, chemical and supply procurement, and billing procedures.
description:
Established 30-Year Commercial Janitorial Company - Orange County, CA

This turnkey commercial janitorial operation represents a rare opportunity to acquire three decades of brand equity and operational excellence in California's most lucrative commercial markets. With over 90% recurring revenue from established service contracts, this business delivers predictable cash flow with significant growth potential.

FINANCIAL HIGHLIGHTS:
• Annual Revenue: $700,000
• Seller's Discretionary Earnings: $190,000
• 90%+ recurring contract revenue
• Established 1990 - 34 years of continuous operation
• Absentee-ready operations

OPERATIONAL ADVANTAGES:
• Experienced subcontractor network handles field operations
• Home-based business model minimizes overhead
• Established supplier relationships ensure cost control
• Proven systems for client communication, scheduling, and billing
• Well-stocked supplies and equipment inventory

MARKET POSITION:
• Serves Orange County and Los Angeles County commercial markets
• Non-discretionary service demand provides recession resistance
• 30-year reputation creates competitive moat against new entrants
• Operates in highly fragmented industry dominated by small operators

GROWTH OPPORTUNITIES:
• Add dedicated sales infrastructure to accelerate new account acquisition
• Expand into higher-margin verticals (medical, schools, industrial)
• Increase geographic density to improve operational efficiency
• Upsell premium services (window cleaning, pressure washing, floor care)
• Market has abundant commercial accounts ready for capture

IDEAL FOR:
• Hands-on operators seeking growth-focused acquisition
• Passive investors wanting contract-based recurring revenue
• Buyers looking for absentee-ready business model

SELLER SUPPORT:
• Comprehensive 30-60 day training program
• Coverage of all operational aspects and client relationships
• Post-close consulting available for extended support
• Seamless transition with established subcontractor relationshi
